title: Update module github.com/hugelgupf/p9 to v0.4.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/hugelgupf/p9](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9) | `v0.3.1-0.20260209234446-ba5af0b37df0` → `v0.4.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fhugelgupf%2fp9/v0.4.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fhugelgupf%2fp9/v0.3.1-0.20260209234446-ba5af0b37df0/v0.4.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>hugelgupf/p9 (github.com/hugelgupf/p9)</summary>

### [`v0.4.0`](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/releases/tag/v0.4.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0)

#### What's Changed

- Remove direct gRPC dependency by [@​hugelgupf](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf) in [#​84](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/84)
- Update vmtest, use new API by [@​hugelgupf](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf) in [#​88](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/88)
- Implement UnlinkAt in localfs by [@​edouardklein](https://redirect.github.com/edouardklein) in [#​87](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/87)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/net from 0.14.0 to 0.17.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​85](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/85)
- GitHub Workflow: tests by [@​hugelgupf](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf) in [#​89](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/89)
- p9ufs: clarify that :port is required by [@​abitrolly](https://redirect.github.com/abitrolly) in [#​93](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/93)
- ci: update action dependencies by [@​djdv](https://redirect.github.com/djdv) in [#​92](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/92)
- Add (ironically) Plan 9 support to this 9p package. by [@​rminnich](https://redirect.github.com/rminnich) in [#​91](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/91)
- Add plan 9 server support by [@​rminnich](https://redirect.github.com/rminnich) in [#​96](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/96)
- Fix inode collision on Unix by [@​brho](https://redirect.github.com/brho) in [#​104](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/104)

#### New Contributors

- [@​edouardklein](https://redirect.github.com/edouardklein) made their first contribution in [#​87](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/87)
- [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] made their first contribution in [#​85](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/85)
- [@​abitrolly](https://redirect.github.com/abitrolly) made their first contribution in [#​93](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/93)
- [@​brho](https://redirect.github.com/brho) made their first contribution in [#​104](https://redirect.github.com/hugelgupf/p9/pull/104)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/hugelgupf/p9/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0>

</details>
